name: Body Tracking Reactive
description: A camera-reactive performance look: the 33 MediaPipe body landmarks become glowing dots that leave luminous motion trails as the performer moves, via a feedback loop. Point the 'posein' Select CHOP at the pose-landmarks CHOP from the free torinmb/mediapipe-touchdesigner plugin (33 samples, tx/ty/tz) — webcam only, no Kinect or extra hardware. Run setup_body_tracking first to load the engine and emit that CHOP, or use create_body_reactive for a self-contained synthetic preview.

nodes.name: posein
nodes.comment: Set 'chops' to the MediaPipe plugin's pose-landmarks CHOP (33 samples, tx/ty/tz)

nodes.name: dot
nodes.comment: The mark stamped on each landmark

nodes.name: pts
nodes.comment: 33 landmark samples become 33 points (tx/ty/tz map to position)

nodes.name: copy
nodes.comment: Stamp the dot on every landmark point

nodes.name: feedback1
nodes.comment: Holds the previous (decayed) frame — the motion trail

nodes.name: comp1
nodes.comment: Add the live dots over the fed-back trail

nodes.name: decay
nodes.comment: Trail decay / feedback gain — higher = longer trails

nodes.name: glow
nodes.comment: Add a bloom of the trail for the luminous glow

parameters.name: feedback_target
parameters.description: feedbackTOP samples the decayed composite (decay), forming the trail loop. Value resolves to the created node path.

preview_description: Cyan glowing dots tracing a person's joints, smearing into luminous trails as they move in front of the webcam — a hands-free reactive performance look.
